products.title: Corporate Multi-Patch Varsity
products.description: Jaket varsity klasik — bahan tebal, lengan kontras, patch bordir rapi.

products.title: Service Crew Shirt
products.description: Kemeja kerja lengan pendek — adem, ringan, bordir logo rapi buat frontliner.

products.title: Motorsport Patch Shirt
products.description: Kemeja oxford putih dengan patch bordir tim. Potongan formal slim buat kru & event.

products.title: Brand Capsule Tee
products.description: Kaos cotton combed 24s, sablon halus. Adem dipakai harian, jahitan rapi.

products.title: Field Operation Safari
products.description: Kemeja lapangan bahan twill, dua saku flap. Kuat & adem buat tim operasional.

products.title: Heavyweight Team Hoodie
products.description: Hoodie fleece tebal, jahitan rapi. Anget & nyaman jadi outer tim.

products.title: Corporate Field Shirt
products.description: Kemeja kerja navy lengan panjang, saku flap. Rapi & tahan lama buat tim lapangan.

products.title: T-Shirt
products.description: Cotton combed premium 24s/30s. DTG, sablon plastisol, atau bordir — bebas pilih finishing.

products.title: Kemeja
products.description: American drill, oxford, atau premium poplin. Cocok untuk seragam dan event formal.

products.title: Jaket
products.description: Bomber, hoodie, atau coach jacket. Bahan tahan cuaca dengan finishing rapi.

products.title: Poloshirt
products.description: Pique cotton, lacoste, atau cooldry. Bordir logo dan nama sesuai kebutuhan.

products.title: Wearpack
products.description: Drill, ripstop, atau canvas. Reflective tape opsional untuk safety standar.
